title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six skills for improving Claude project output: web scraping for data discovery, ingest-source for knowledge capture, improve-system for iterative compounding, ask-the-board for expert perspectives, internal-focus-group for testing, and compound engineering for shipping. The methodology is demonstrated through building a personal fitness trainer project from scratch.
